raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "Unbounded pagination in GET /skills/{name} — risks OOM at scale", "recommended_fix": "Add default limit=50, require explicit offset/limit params, enforce max limit=500"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/zeus/assessment_engine.py", "issue": "Synchronous database calls in generate_assessment() — blocks event loop under load", "recommended_fix": "Rewrite with asyncpg, use connection pool, add timeout=10s"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/api.ts", "issue": "API base URL hardcoded in multiple files — breaks multi-region deploy", "recommended_fix": "Move to ENV var NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE, use edge proxy routing"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/main.py", "issue": "No request size limit — vulnerable to body payload DoS", "recommended_fix": "Add FastAPI middleware with max_content_length=10_485_760 (10MB)"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Feed.tsx", "issue": "Infinite scroll fetches next page on render — causes n+1 waterfall at scale", "recommended_fix": "Implement cursor-based loading with useEffect, throttle triggers"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/db/session.py", "issue": "Database session reused across requests — data leakage and connection contention", "recommended_fix": "Enforce dependency-injected session per request, close after response"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/hooks/useProfile.ts", "issue": "Profile data fetched on every component mount — redundant under heavy component trees", "recommended_fix": "Migrate to React Query with stale-while-revalidate, 5m cache"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Unindexed query on assessment_results.user_id — full table scan at scale", "recommended_fix": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_assessment_results_user_id ON assessment_results(user_id)"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/utils/logger.ts", "issue": "Client-side console logs include full error stacks — exposes internal structure", "recommended_fix": "Sanitize and redact before client log, forward details to server-side only"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/llm/provider_router.py", "issue": "Hot loop over LLM providers without circuit breaker — cascading failure risk", "recommended_fix": "Add tenacity retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker at 3 failures"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Unbounded pagination in GET /skills/{name} — risks OOM at scale
findings.recommended_fix: Add default limit=50, require explicit offset/limit params, enforce max limit=500

findings.issue: Synchronous database calls in generate_assessment() — blocks event loop under load
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite with asyncpg, use connection pool, add timeout=10s

findings.issue: API base URL hardcoded in multiple files — breaks multi-region deploy
findings.recommended_fix: Move to ENV var NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE, use edge proxy routing

findings.issue: No request size limit — vulnerable to body payload DoS
Infinite scroll fetches next page on render — causes n+1 waterfall at scale
findings.recommended_fix: Implement cursor-based loading with useEffect, throttle triggers

findings.issue: Database session reused across requests — data leakage and connection contention
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce dependency-injected session per request, close after response

findings.issue: Profile data fetched on every component mount — redundant under heavy component trees
findings.recommended_fix: Migrate to React Query with stale-while-revalidate, 5m cache

findings.issue: Unindexed query on assessment_results.user_id — full table scan at scale
findings.recommended_fix: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_assessment_results_user_id ON assessment_results(user_id)

findings.issue: Client-side console logs include full error stacks — exposes internal structure
findings.recommended_fix: Sanitize and redact before client log, forward details to server-side only

findings.issue: Hot loop over LLM providers without circuit breaker — cascading failure risk
findings.recommended_fix: Add tenacity retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker at 3 failures
